name: Llyn Brianne Reservoir Viewpoint
terrain: Forestry track, steep path to viewpoint
highlights: Tower of concrete holding back 13km of wild water in the remote upper Tywi.
points_of_interest: Llyn Brianne dam (highest rockfill dam in UK); RSPB Gwenffrwd-Dinas hide nearby
viewpoints: Dam-top panorama; reservoir fingers reaching into forest
water_features: Llyn Brianne reservoir; River Tywi below dam
parking_start: Llyn Brianne dam viewpoint car park (free)
food_drink_nearby: The Towy Bridge Inn Rhandirmwyn; Royal Oak Rhandirmwyn
hazards_notes: Single-track road in; remote — fuel up before
